message:
feat(ui): conditional footer HUD lanes and refined empty-state display

Reduces visual noise in the footer HUD by only showing lanes that carry
meaningful information:

- pane/idx lanes hidden when only one pane is open
- sel (selection count) hidden when nothing is selected
- Match-type breakdown (exact/prefix/fuzzy/mix) hidden when all results
  are exact matches — only shown when there's a genuine type mix
- src (source filter) hidden when the filter is set to "all"

Also refines the empty-state splash screen: the query display now uses
typographic quotes and italic styling, and is only shown when the query
is non-empty.

8 search-surface snapshots updated to reflect the sparser default
footer layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
